title: This ETF Holds Some of the Top Women-Led Companies
text: Various studies indicate that publicly traded companies having gender diversity in the C-suite and on the board can lead to better outcomes for investors. Along those lines, a strong case can be made that not enough major U.S. companies, including plenty of S&P 500 members, are promoting women to the highest “C”-level jobs.

title: Otis: Resilient Company In A Competitive Landscape, Solid And Prudent Cash Management
text: OTIS delivered good results in Q4 2021, with organic sales up by 2.8%. Prudent cash management, with $500M debt deleveraging and a potential share buyback planned for FY2022. At the current price level of $83, I recommend monitoring the stock and entering when the opportunity comes.
